perturbation.original_text: When the laboratory is required by law or authorized by contractual arrangements to release confidential information, the customer shall, unless prohibited by law, be notified of the information provided BEFORE information released.
perturbation.changed_text: As part of the SANAS accreditation arrangement and Internal audit policy, SMT LABS PTY LTD will be assessed and audited on an ongoing basis to ensure continuous compliance to ISO/IEC 17025 and SANAS policies and procedures. All service providers (including SANAS) have signed a Non -disclosure Agreement/ Confidentiality Agreement as part of our contractual agreement. When the laboratory is required by law or authorized by contractual arrangements to release confidential information, the customer shall, unless prohibited by law, be notified of the information provided BEFORE information released.
perturbation.explanation: Moving the required notification clause to a less prominent position within a paragraph discussing audits and compliance obscures its importance. It no longer stands out as a critical right of the customer.
perturbation.contradicted_law: Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 (South Africa)
perturbation.law_explanation: Section 14(3) of the Protection of Personal Information Act requires responsible parties to take reasonably practicable steps to ensure that the data subject is aware of the fact that their information is being collected or has been accessed by an unauthorized party. By burying the notification clause within a paragraph about audits, the agreement fails to ensure the data subject's awareness of their rights in a clear and prominent manner.
perturbation.scraped_snippet_1: Page Not Found | GovInfo Skip to main content Page Not Found Help Error occurred. The page you requested cannot be found. Please report this error to askGPO. Provide the following information to help us resolve this problem: the URL of the page you were trying to access, the steps you followed to produce the error, specific search or browse terms, and/or a screenshot of the page where the error occurred. Thank you for your patience. Homepage Search Tips Skip back to top
perturbation.justification: The modified text introduces a structural flaw by embedding the crucial notification clause within a paragraph focused on audits and compliance. This obscures the clause's significance, potentially leading to a failure in ensuring the customer is aware of their rights, as argued in the Law Explanation. This aligns with the definition of 'Structural Flaws Legal Contradiction,' where a required legal disclosure is placed in an irrelevant or misleading section. The scraped snippet is a dead link. However, the perturbation explanation coupled with the law explanation explains the way that a contradiction exists.
